_comment: referenceNow anchors echo-recency math (fixture created_at values keep their session/day-window meaning forever). echoTraces maps each pollution-arm trace to the logical agent key that authored it; the runner mints a real api_key uuid per logical key per run and stamps these rows (imports write api_key_id NULL). All echoes here sit inside the 90-minute session window before referenceNow, i.e. full demotion weight.
